description_long: This futuristic jet ski features a sleek, aerodynamic body with a glossy white finish and black-tinted windows. The front is equipped with a distinctive array of six circular headlights on each side, giving it a high-tech appearance. The side profile reveals smooth, contoured surfaces and integrated fins, with a pair of wing-like structures at the rear for enhanced stability and style. The cockpit is enclosed with a dark, transparent canopy, suggesting a single or dual seating arrangement. The undercarriage includes streamlined elements and what appear to be propulsion units, hinting at advanced maneuverability. Overall, the design is modern and visually striking, blending elements of both watercraft and futuristic vehicles.
description: A sleek, glossy white jet ski with black-tinted windows, multiple headlights, and wing-like rear fins, featuring a futuristic, aerodynamic design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the prominent array of circular headlights, black-tinted canopy, and the pointed nose with aerodynamic lines.
description_view_1: Left-side perspective highlights the smooth, contoured body, integrated fins, and the wing-like rear structures, as well as the enclosed cockpit.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the dual rear fins, propulsion unit, and the streamlined back end with visible exhaust or thruster details.
description_view_3: Right-side perspective mirrors the left, showing the contoured body, headlight array, and aerodynamic rear fins.
attribute_handlebar_design: The handlebar is integrated into the front section, appearing as two short, upward-angled grips with a streamlined, minimalistic design in black and gray.
attribute_seat_configuration: The seat appears to be a single, contoured position, smoothly integrated into the body with a black finish and ergonomic shaping for one or possibly two riders.
